mapper.select: SELECT p.*, are.area_nm AS area_nm, pan.panel_nm AS panel_nm FROM dp_area_panel p LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = p.area_id LEFT JOIN dp_panel pan ON pan.panel_id = p.panel_id WHERE p.area_panel_id = #{id}

SELECT p.*, are.area_nm AS area_nm, pan.panel_nm AS panel_nm FROM dp_area_panel p LEFT JOIN dp_area are ON are.area_id = p.area_id LEFT JOIN dp_panel pan ON pan.panel_id = p.panel_id
ORDER BY p.area_panel_id ASC ORDER BY p.area_panel_id DESC ORDER BY p.reg_date ASC ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC ORDER BY p.reg_date DESC
